name: Shopify
confidenceReason: Unavoidable e-commerce infrastructure with 26-28% EPS growth estimates. However, extreme trailing valuation (136x PE) means the CAGR model shows negative returns at current prices.
bullCase: The default operating system for independent e-commerce globally. Expanding merchant solutions and strong operating leverage driving earnings.
bearCase: Current forward PE is ~96x, leaving zero margin for error in growth execution. Consumer spending slowdowns impact gross merchandise volume.
